summary: Score holding at 3.9/5. The persistent backlog items from reviews #18-#20 remain unfixed — MANAGER_QUOTES dead code, DEFAULT_ROSTER not extracted, and CharacterAvatar missing React.memo. These are 5-minute fixes that keep getting punted. New this review: found a real bug with the keyboard shortcut R-to-sync conflicting with text input focus detection, and the useCallback hoisting issue is technically a lint violation. Mobile header overflow at 375px is the biggest UX gap remaining.

suggestions.title: R-key sync shortcut fires during IME composition and contentEditable elements
suggestions.description: App.jsx keyboard handler checks for INPUT and TEXTAREA tags but misses contentEditable elements, elements with role='textbox', and IME composition events. If any future feature adds a contentEditable area (or a third-party widget does), pressing R will trigger a sync mid-typing. Add: if (e.target.isContentEditable || e.isComposing) return. Trivial fix, prevents a future footgun.

suggestions.title: CSS tooltip only triggers on :hover — keyboard users see nothing (4th flag)
suggestions.description: The data-tooltip attribute on Character elements renders via CSS ::after on :hover only. Keyboard users who tab to a character get focus-visible outlines but never see the tooltip. Add :focus-within to the tooltip CSS rule alongside :hover. This was flagged in reviews #19 and #20. Still not fixed.

suggestions.title: Card flip back-face not hidden from screen readers when front is showing (3rd flag)
suggestions.description: WorkerCard uses aria-hidden on front/back faces keyed to isFlipped state, but the back-face content is still in the DOM and tabbable (the close button). Add tabIndex={-1} to the close button when !isFlipped, or use inert attribute on the hidden face. Screen reader users can currently tab into invisible content.

suggestions.title: MANAGER_QUOTES is permanently unreachable dead code (4th flag)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx: MANAGER_QUOTES was the original fallback but VIBE_QUOTES covers all 5 vibe keys. The || fallback never executes. This has been flagged since review #18. It's a 1-line delete. Please just do it.

suggestions.title: DEFAULT_ROSTER still in Office.jsx — move to constants.js (5th flag)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx lines 53-59: DEFAULT_ROSTER, VIBE_QUOTES, VIBE_WHITEBOARD, and DESKS are all pure data that belong in utils/constants.js. ROLE_EMOJIS and ROLE_COLORS were already extracted. This is a consistency issue. Flagged since review #17.

suggestions.title: Mobile header overflow — vibe pill + sync button + theme toggle clip at 375px (3rd flag)
suggestions.description: At 375px viewport width, .header-right doesn't wrap. The vibe pill, sync button, streak counter, and theme toggle overflow. Add flex-wrap: wrap to .header-right in the @media (max-width: 600px) query. Alternatively, hide the streak counter on mobile since it has no tooltip anyway.

suggestions.title: CharacterAvatar and Character components missing React.memo (3rd flag)
suggestions.description: Office.jsx: CharacterAvatar is a pure function of its props but isn't memoized. Every 30s poll re-renders all characters even when nothing changed. Wrap both CharacterAvatar and Character in React.memo(). Free optimization, zero risk.

suggestions.title: syncFromGitHub useCallback referenced before definition — lint violation
suggestions.description: App.jsx: the keyboard shortcut useEffect at ~line 465 references syncFromGitHub in its dependency array, but the useCallback defining it is at ~line 500. JavaScript hoisting makes it work at runtime, but eslint-plugin-react-hooks will flag this. Move the useCallback above the useEffect. While at it, the useEffect deps include [isSyncing, syncFromGitHub] but syncFromGitHub is stable (empty deps useCallback), so isSyncing alone would suffice.

suggestions.title: Vibe streak counter has no explanation for new visitors (2nd flag)
suggestions.description: The 'x7' number next to the vibe pill has no tooltip or label. First-time visitors have zero context. Add title='Consecutive syncs at this vibe level' to the streak span. One attribute, huge clarity improvement.

suggestions.title: Orphaned .stat-card.done CSS — no rendered element uses it
suggestions.description: App.css line 157: .stat-card.done .stat-value { color: var(--blue); } — no stat card with class 'done' is rendered. Dead CSS from a removed feature. Delete it or re-add the done stat card if it was intentional.

suggestions.title: Whiteboard text truncates to 'SH IP IT' on narrow mobile viewports
suggestions.description: The office-whiteboard is 5.5% wide with word-break. At 375px that's ~20px, breaking 'SHIP IT' mid-word. Either increase width on mobile, use emoji-only format, or hide below 480px.

suggestions.title: WindowElement's getHour() function is recreated every render
suggestions.description: Office.jsx WindowElement: getHour is defined inside the component body and also used inside useEffect, but it's recreated every render. Extract it outside the component or wrap in useCallback. Minor but it's a code smell.
